productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Women Urban Musk Perfume 75 ml
description: For the urban tough talker, this nike fragrances Urban Musk fragrance for women is inspired by the musky tones often used in men's eau de toilettes. Reminiscent of career women and the androgynous mood of the moment, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, is best for formal outings and beach wear. Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
